name: sre-engineer-assistant
description: SRE Engineer Assistant is a plugin designed to assist Site Reliability Engineers (SREs) in managing and optimizing their systems. It provides tools for investigating alerts, performing root cause analysis, and resolving incidents, helping SREs maintain the reliability and performance of their applications.

features.name: Alert Triage
features.description: Classify alerts, deduplicate noise, and route escalations automatically.

features.name: Root Cause Analysis
features.description: Correlate metrics, logs, traces, and events to identify root causes.

features.name: Incident Management
features.description: Coordinate mitigation, recovery, and stakeholder communications during incidents.

features.name: SLO & Error Budget
features.description: Monitor reliability targets and make policy-driven reliability decisions.

features.name: Observability Correlation
features.description: Unify signals from multiple observability sources for faster diagnosis.

features.name: Runbooks
features.description: Execute operational runbooks with preconditions and safety checks.

features.name: Postmortems
features.description: Generate blameless postmortems and corrective action plans.

features.name: Capacity Planning
features.description: Forecast utilization and identify scaling bottlenecks.

features.name: Change Risk Analysis
features.description: Evaluate deployment and configuration change risks before rollout.

features.name: Incident Communications
features.description: Draft internal and external incident status updates.

features.name: Dependency Mapping
features.description: Identify blast radius and service dependencies.
